svg.text: The discipline scaffold Claude Code reads first — everything @-imported is re-injected after every compaction.

text.tspan: phase map: status table + Mermaid DAG
permissions — deny secrets · ask before push
runtime state — appears as you work
live module map — updated on every change
dev tooling — never enters the prod image

svg.text: clone = full kit + docs + permissions • /plugin install keel@keel = the tooling layer, everywhere
